# LingGlow / 灵妆

Canonical website: https://aiaiai.homes/
Canonical repository: https://github.com/AI-Scarlett/LingGlow
Latest release: https://github.com/AI-Scarlett/LingGlow/releases/latest

LingGlow is a macOS AI agent theme and skin manager for Codex/GPT, WorkBuddy, and Doubao. It provides featured and searchable remote skin catalogs, a My Skins library for downloaded and purchased themes, per-agent compatibility labels, light/dark appearance profiles, secure updates, and a reusable skin-authoring Skill.

Supported platform: macOS 13+
Supported languages: Simplified Chinese and English
Distribution: Developer ID signed and Apple-notarized DMG
Source policy: the public repository contains binaries, public catalog data, previews, documentation, and the skin Skill; application source code is not published.

Primary docs:
- User guide: https://github.com/AI-Scarlett/LingGlow/blob/main/docs/USER-GUIDE.md
- Skin creation guide: https://github.com/AI-Scarlett/LingGlow/blob/main/docs/CREATE-SKIN-WITH-SKILL.md
- Product facts: https://github.com/AI-Scarlett/LingGlow/blob/main/docs/PRODUCT-FACTS.md
- Skin gallery: https://github.com/AI-Scarlett/LingGlow/blob/main/catalog/v1/GALLERY.md
- Privacy: https://github.com/AI-Scarlett/LingGlow/blob/main/docs/PRIVACY.md
- Purchase terms: https://github.com/AI-Scarlett/LingGlow/blob/main/docs/PURCHASE-TERMS.md
